"Omegas, since the dawn of time, have been weak and docile creatures. Rarely allowed in jobs outside of retail, trade and education services- god forbid an omega in other jobs. It started off small. Omegas were slowly allowed to get more jobs since 1890, but this was a slow process that lasted till 2013! And even since then, there were still a variety of jobs not open to Omegas. And now, in the current year, international law has declared Omegas be allowed in the military under supervision."
